values: 空灵的、超凡脱俗的；常用于光线、音乐、气质或风景。
The mountains looked almost ethereal in the morning mist.
容光焕发的、明亮动人的；适合描述人、笑容、光线或气场。
She looked radiant after hearing the good news.
精致而优雅的；强调细节、品味、工艺或判断力。
The proposal showed an exquisite balance between efficiency and empathy.
萦绕心头的；常用于音乐、诗歌、眼神或记忆，美中带有深度或忧伤。
It was a haunting melody that stayed with me for days.
令人着迷的、让人移不开注意力的。
Her presentation was mesmerizing because it was deeply clear.
发光、泛光；也可表示人容光焕发。
The city glowed under the evening sky.
微微闪烁、泛着柔光；常用于水面、丝绸、灯光。
The lake shimmered in the late afternoon sun.
吸引、迷住；比 attract 更有感染力和沉浸感。
The speaker captivated the audience with a quiet but powerful story.
逗留、迟迟不去；也可表示感觉、记忆或气味萦绕。
A sense of calm lingered in the room after the music stopped.
惆怅的、带着温柔怀旧的。
He gave a wistful smile as he looked at the old photos.
忧郁的、带沉静感的；比 sad 更文学、更有层次。
There was a quiet melancholy in her voice.
苦乐参半的；同时包含失落与珍贵感。
Leaving the city was bittersweet: painful, but necessary.
清晰易懂的；也可形容思路、解释或表达非常明朗。
Her explanation was lucid enough to align the whole team within minutes.
敏锐而切中要害的；常用于分析、评论、判断。
He offered an incisive diagnosis of why the project had stalled.
有细微差别和层次的；适合表达复杂判断。
The report gives a nuanced view of customer frustration across channels.
有说服力的、逻辑严密的；常用于论点、方案、解释。
She made a cogent case for simplifying the service workflow.
简洁有力的；强调少而准。
The executive summary was succinct but not shallow.
提炼、浓缩；把复杂信息变成核心结论。
The team distilled months of feedback into three design principles.
澄清、使清楚；常用于需求、责任、观点。
We need to clarify the handoff rules before the pilot expands.
精准指出、定位；适合问题诊断和根因分析。
The dashboard helped pinpoint where calls were being transferred unnecessarily.
清楚表达；也可作形容词表示表达清晰的。
He articulated the customer pain points without exaggeration.
理清、解开复杂纠缠；适合流程、责任、问题边界。
The workshop helped disentangle billing issues from network complaints.
模糊不清的、有歧义的；常用于要求、信号、责任。
The instruction was ambiguous, so different teams interpreted it differently.
富有启发的、让人看清问题的。
The interview was illuminating because it revealed what customers actually feared.

preview: 空灵的、超凡脱俗的；常用于光线、音乐、气质或风景。
The mountains looked almost ethereal in the morning mist.
容光焕发的、明亮动人的；适合描述人、笑容、光线或气场。
She looked radiant after hearing the good news.
精致而优雅的；强调细节、品味、工艺或判断力。
The proposal showed an exquisite balance between efficiency and empathy.
萦绕心头的；常用于音乐、诗歌、眼神或记忆，美中带有深度或忧伤。
It was a haunting melody that stayed with me for days.
